title: HostileMobSpawning
description: Show lighting levels in Minecraft for monsters to spawn
body:
To work this pack do need Optifine

This Resource Pack will change Minecraft's lighting to show where monsters can and can't spawn. Don't forget to enable "Custom Color" in Video Settings > Quality > Custom Colors: ON
(You may need to restart the game.)

In 1.18+ mobs only spawn at a light level of 0

| RED           | BLUE               |
|:---------------------:|:---------------------:|
| All monsters can spawn here | All mobs that rely on light levels cannot spawn here |

RED = Dangerous: All monsters can spawn here.\
BLUE = Very Safe: All mobs that rely on light levels cannot spawn here.

With Optifine change the option "smooth lightning" to off for more precision
